mapper.sql: notification_no, user_no, title, content, read_yn, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_no, title, content, read_yn) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{title}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{readYn}, false))
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notification WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY notification_no DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND read_yn = false
